title: senecillis altaica
intro: Senecillis altaica, also known as Groundsel Tree or Cnicus altissimus, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and bitter leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits associated with Senecillis altaica include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be made into a poultice or infusion to treat various health conditions.
